canonical_name: ADAMTS1 (A Disintegrin and Metalloproteinase with Thrombospondin Motifs 1)
step_rationale: Metalloproteinase implicated in extracellular matrix degradation and plaque destabilization.
mechanism: ADAMTS1 upregulation contributes to fibrous-cap degradation and atherosclerotic plaque rupture.

references.title: Identification of an 11 immune-related gene signature as the novel biomarker for acute myocardial infarction diagnosis.
